title: 影像组学和基因组学的本质差别是什么？
abstract: 影像组学是从影像里抽 hand-crafted 特征做统计分析，基因组学是从测序数据做表达模式聚类。两者结合即放射基因组学（radiogenomics）。

author.bio: 示例数据 · 放射肿瘤学方向

title: Decoding tumour phenotype by noninvasive imaging using a quantitative radiomics approach
abstract: Aerts et al., Nature Communications 2014. The seminal radiomics paper introducing 440 hand-crafted CT features predicting prognosis across multiple lung cancer cohorts.

author.displayName: Aerts H J W L et al.

title: Reproducibility and Generalizability in Radiomics Modeling
abstract: Park J E et al., Eur Radiol 2020. Survey of 77 radiomics studies; only 6% provided truly independent external validation.

title: 为什么放射基因组学进入临床这么慢？
abstract: 外部验证不够、监管审批路径不清晰、医院 PACS 数据脱敏成本高。

author.bio: 示例数据 · 临床影像 AI

title: External Validation of a Deep Learning Radiomics Model for NSCLC
abstract: Wang H et al., Radiology 2023. Cross-institutional AUC drop from 0.74 to 0.62 when validated on RIDER Lung CT cohort.
